title: Smoky Algerian Apple Bake
description: A sweet and savory dessert blending smoky flavors with Algerian spices, topped with a crunchy apple crisp.
instructions: Mix together algerian and bake in a bowl.
In a separate bowl, combine apple and smoky.
Add chewy to the apple mixture and stir until coated.
Pour the apple mixture into a 9x9-inch baking dish.
Mix the algerian-bake mixture with a little water to create a paste.
Spread the paste on top of the apple mixture.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the top is golden brown.
Let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
